texto: You will say things with a merry tongue
autor: you are not one for graceless words and no one will take offence. I will cause you to instruct many and your words will carry because they are not your words but my words – living words passing from generation to generation even to those yet unborn.
explicacao: Citação de you are not one for graceless words and no one will take offence. I will cause you to instruct many and your words will carry because they are not your words but my words – living words passing from generation to generation even to those yet unborn. sobre temas ligados a fe. “You will say things with a merry tongue” articula fe, noella-menon, the-merry-tongue-a-story-of-love em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como termino e luto.
